version: alpha
name: legacy-fixture
colors:
  primary: "#0066CC"
  on-primary: "#FFFFFF"

  label-md:
    fontFamily: Inter
    fontSize: 14px
    fontWeight: 500
---

## Overview

Legacy-fixture is a design system. The values in this file are the source of truth.

## Colors

This system defines 2 colour tokens.

## Typography

Label-md is used for button text.

## The Five Dimensions

Sentiment, emphasis, size, structure, and state describe every component's runtime variant.

## Spacing

The spacing scale doubles each step. Use multiples of 8px for layout.

## Component Size Scale

The size axis runs xs → xl with md as default.

## Identity

This product feels measured and precise. Avoid playful flourishes.

## Aesthetic direction

Lean into restraint. Type-led layouts, generous negative space.

## Stale Section

This section is out of date and should be removed during migrate.
